case_title: JUAN CARLOS TAFOYA GRANADOS VS. JOSHUA SHARYAR SHIDEH

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRANADOS, JUAN CARLOS TAFOYA AS TO DEFENDANT SHIDEH, JOSHUA SHARYAR AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRANADOS, JUAN CARLOS TAFOYA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHIDEH, JOSHUA SHARYAR AN INDIVIDUAL $10,131.27 PRINCIPAL, $631.14 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,132.41, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 78577061) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRANADOS, JUAN CARLOS TAFOYA AS TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
